prompt: World-class graphic designer Meta Ads carousel slide — final offer/CTA. 1:1 square format, 1080x1080px. BACKGROUND: Solid flat black (#0f0f0f), uniform, no gradients. LAYOUT: Two-column with CTA bar at bottom. LEFT COLUMN (left 55%): Top-aligned, left margin 40px. Line 1: Bold uppercase white text — 'IMMUNOCAL AZUL' in heavy display font (Bebas Neue). Line 2: A yellow-gold rounded pill badge (#FFD700 background, dark text) — '20% DE DESCUENTO'. Line 3: White text with strikethrough styling — 'RD$7,300' (strikethrough line through it). Line 4: Very large bold white text — 'RD$5,840'. Lines 5-7: Three rows with white checkmark icon and white clean sans-serif text — '✓  Pago contra entrega' / '✓  Entrega 24-72 horas' / '✓  Asesor real por WhatsApp'. RIGHT COLUMN (right 45%): The Immunocal Azul product box — COMPLETELY AND FULLY CONTAINED within the right column. The ENTIRE product is visible — all 4 edges of the box are inside the image frame. Product has minimum 50px clearance from the right image border, 60px from the top, 80px clearance above the blue CTA bar at bottom, 15px clearance from the center divider. Product is vertically centered in the right column. Intense royal blue radial glow (#1A56DB / #2563EB) emanates from directly behind the product, making it pop dramatically against the black background. Photorealistic 3D product box. CTA BAR: A solid royal blue bar (#1D4ED8) spanning the FULL WIDTH at the very bottom of the image, containing large bold uppercase white text — 'ESCRÍBENOS AHORA'. Small grey text centered just above the blue bar — 'IMMUNOCAL AZUL — IMMUNOTEC'. DESIGN: Premium, clean, high-conversion advertising layout. No clutter.
negative_prompt: product cropped, product cut off, product outside image boundaries, product bleeding past frame edge, product partially hidden or clipped, photorealistic background scenes, people, models, lifestyle photography, gradient on main background, light background, blurry, watermark, extra decorative elements
